headline: How The CoStar Group (CSGP) Investment Story Is Shifting After Homescom And Activist Pressure
summary: CoStar Group’s modeled fair value has been trimmed slightly, with the price target moving from US$65.42 to US$64.89 per share. Analysts link this reset to a broader round of refreshed targets following Q4 results, updated 2026 and medium term guidance, and mixed views on the Homes.com investment case. As you read on, you will see how these shifting price targets fit into the evolving story around growth, risk, and what to watch next. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full story...

headline: How The NetApp (NTAP) Story Is Shifting With Memory Costs And Flash Cloud Expectations
summary: NetApp’s latest analyst update keeps the core fair value estimate anchored at US$117.93, while Street price targets now range from the high US$80s to around US$128. That spread reflects very different reads on how memory and component costs, flash storage positioning, and public cloud exposure could shape the risk and reward profile. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these shifting targets and track the evolving narrative around the stock. Analyst Price Targets don't always...

headline: AT&T Receives 2 Price Target Hikes From Goldman Sachs and KeyBanc

headline: Goldman M&A Head Sees ‘Massive’ Capital Pools Driving M&A
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Wall Street is awash in “massive pools of capital” that should drive M&A activity over the long-term, even as volatility upends dealmaking, according to one of Goldman Sachs Group Inc.’s top dealmakers. “There is an incredible amount of capital sitting with investors,” Stephan Feldgoise, Goldman’s head of global M&A, said in an interview Wednesday with Bloomberg TV. “Public equity, private equity, public debt, private debt. headline: Golar LNG Limited announces strategic review to maximize stakeholder value and appoints Goldman Sachs as financial advisor
summary: Golar LNG Limited (NASDAQ: GLNG) (“Golar” or the “Company”) today announced its Board of Directors has initiated a formal process to evaluate strategic alternatives for the Company. As previewed on the 4th Quarter 2025 results, this review aims to accelerate the FLNG growth pipeline and maximize shareholder value, reflecting Golar’s successful transition into a high-growth, pure-play Floating Liquefied Natural Gas (FLNG) company.
